hero.badge: The best prep for junior developers
hero.title: Land your next IT job faster
hero.subtitle: Practice interview questions that juniors actually get on interviews.
hero.earlyAcces: Early access launching soon. Join the waitlist to get notified first.
hero.cardTitle: One calm loop from practice to confidence

cards.title: Flashcards
cards.text: Short recall sessions that make answers stick.

cards.title: Mock interviews
cards.text: Timed prompts that teach you to answer under pressure.

cards.title: Review loop
cards.text: Repeat concepts until they feel automatic.

features.heading: Flashcards and interview simulations designed around real hiring questions - so you walk into interviews prepared, not guessing.
features.intro: Short drills. Real questions. A calmer path to confidence.

value.heading: Get Your First Job
value.text: Land your first IT job faster by practicing real interview questions and structured answers instead of learning theory alone.

problem.heading: Why Juniors Fail
problem.text: Most juniors fail not due to lack of knowledge, but because they never practice answering questions under real interview pressure.

how.heading: Simple Daily Practice
how.text: Choose a topic, practice flashcards based on real questions, repeat daily, and gradually build confidence for real interview situations.

simulation.heading: Mock Interview Training
simulation.text: Simulate real interviews with timed questions and structured answers so you stop freezing and start responding clearly under pressure.

why.heading: Built On Repetition
why.text: Confidence comes from repetition, not theory. We focus on recall training so answers become automatic during real technical interviews.

built.heading: Made For Beginners
built.text: Built by developers who struggled with first interviews. We designed this to remove confusion, anxiety, and lack of preparation.

features.footerNote: Built around repetition, clarity, and confidence under pressure.

mainScreen.title: Everything in one place
mainScreen.desc: Track progress, view stats, and manage your learning.

splashScreen.title: Start learning in seconds
splashScreen.desc: Sign in and continue exactly where you left off.

flashcards.title: Active learning mode
flashcards.desc: Practice flashcards and reinforce knowledge through repetition.

proof.heading: A product that feels focused from the first tap.
proof.subtitle: Less theory, more repetition, more confidence when it matters.
proof.quote: Every screen is designed to keep you moving: short sessions, real questions, and a clear path from practice to confidence.
proof.author: Fishki methodology

cta.title: Stay close to the launch.
cta.subtitle: Get early access when the first polished version is ready. No spam, just product updates.
cta.formNote: Takes less than a minute to join.

footer.tagline: A focused practice system for junior developers who want to feel interview-ready faster.
